data.author: gurum
data.message:
Support minimal functionalities for Jazzy
- Add `rmw_count_clients` and `rmw_count_services`
- Add `rmw_get_gid_for_client`
- Put unimplemented error in `rmw_take_dynamic_message`, `rmw_take_dynamic_message_with_info`, and `rmw_serialization_support_init`
- Include <cstdint> in types.cpp
- Ignore PRECONDITION_NOT_MET when checking WaitSet detach condition

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+# rmw_coredds
+Implementation of the ROS middleware interface using [GurumNetworks CoreDDS](http://www.gurum.cc).
+
+## Requirements
+This project requires `rosidl_typesupport_coredds` to be built. For more information, see README.md of the [project](https://github.com/gurumnet/rosidl_typesupport_coredds).
+
+## Packages
+This project consists of two packages, `rmw_coredds_cpp`, `rmw_coredds_shared_cpp` and `demo_nodes_cpp_native_coredds`.  
+
+### rmw_coredds_cpp
+`rmw_coredds_cpp` is the rmw implementation. You can use this rmw implementation by setting environment variable `RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_coredds_cpp` after installation. For `rmw_coredds_cpp` to work properly, make sure to set environment variable `COREDDS_CONFIG=$COREDDS_HOME/coredds.yaml` and set `allow_loopback` variable in `coredds.yaml` to `true`. If you are not familiar with [YAML](https://yaml.org/), please note that YAML only supports spaces, not tabs, for indentation.  
+
+```
+DATA:
+  allow_loopback: true
+  dynamic_buffer: true
+  mtu: auto # auto | number(1472)
+  bitmap_capacity: 256
+  buffer_capacity: 512
+```
+
+### rmw_coredds_shared_cpp
+`rmw_coredds_shared_cpp` contains some functions used by `rmw_coredds_cpp`. `rmw_coredds_dynamic_cpp` is not implemented yet, but `rmw_coredds_shared_cpp` is separated for expandability.  
+
+### demo_nodes_cpp_native_coredds
+`demo_nodes_cpp_natvie_coredds` is similar to `demo_nodes_cpp_native` from ROS2 `demos`. This demo shows how to access the native handles of `rmw_coredds_cpp`.
+
+## Implementation Status
+Currently some features are not fully implemented.
+- DDS Security
+- Entity status

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(demo_nodes_cpp_native_coredds)
+
+# Default to C++14
+if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
+  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
+endif()
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
+find_package(rmw REQUIRED)
+find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
+find_package(rmw_coredds_cpp QUIET)
+
+function(custom_executable target)
+  add_executable(${target} src/${target}.cpp)
+  ament_target_dependencies(${target}
+    "rclcpp"
+    "std_msgs"
+    "rmw_coredds_cpp")
+  install(TARGETS ${target}
+    DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
+endfunction()
+
+if(rmw_coredds_cpp_FOUND)
+  find_package(rmw_coredds_cpp REQUIRED)
+  custom_executable(talker)
+  custom_executable(listener)
+
+  if(BUILD_TESTING)
+    find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+    ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+
+    find_package(ament_cmake_pytest REQUIRED)
+
+    set(tutorial_executables "talker" "listener")
+
+    set(DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXPECTED_OUTPUT "")
+
+    foreach(executable ${tutorial_executables})
+      list(APPEND DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXPECTED_OUTPUT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/test/${executable}")
+    endforeach()
+
+    set(DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXECUTABLE "")
+    foreach(executable ${tutorial_executables})
+      list(APPEND DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXECUTABLE "$<TARGET_FILE:${executable}>")
+    endforeach()
+
+    string(REPLACE ";" "_" exe_list_underscore "${tutorial_executables}")
+    configure_file(
+      test/test_executables_tutorial.py.in
+      test_${exe_list_underscore}.py.configured
+      @ONLY
+    )
+    file(GENERATE
+      OUTPUT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_${exe_list_underscore}_$<CONFIG>.py"
+      INPUT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_${exe_list_underscore}.py.configured"
+    )
+
+    ament_add_pytest_test(test_tutorial_${exe_list_underscore}
+      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_${exe_list_underscore}_$<CONFIG>.py"
+      TIMEOUT 30
+      ENV
+      RCL_ASSERT_RMW_ID_MATCHES=rmw_coredds_cpp
+      RMW_IMPLEMENTATION=rmw_coredds_cpp)
+    foreach(executable ${tutorial_executables})
+      set_property(
+        TEST test_tutorial_${exe_list_underscore}
+        APPEND PROPERTY DEPENDS ${executable})
+    endforeach()
+  endif()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

+# generated from demo_nodes_cpp_native_coredds/test/test_executables_tutorial.py.in
+# generated code does not contain a copyright notice
+
+from launch.legacy import LaunchDescriptor
+from launch.legacy.exit_handler import ignore_exit_handler
+from launch.legacy.exit_handler import primary_ignore_returncode_exit_handler
+from launch.legacy.launcher import DefaultLauncher
+from launch.legacy.output_handler import ConsoleOutput
+from launch_testing import create_handler
+from launch_testing import get_default_filtered_prefixes
+
+
+def test_executable():
+    output_handlers = []
+
+    launch_descriptor = LaunchDescriptor()
+
+    rmw_implementation = 'rmw_coredds_cpp'
+    executables = '@DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXECUTABLE@'.split(';')
+    output_files = '@DEMO_NODES_CPP_EXPECTED_OUTPUT@'.split(';')
+    for i, (exe, output_file) in enumerate(zip(executables, output_files)):
+        name = 'test_executable_' + str(i)
+        # The last executable is taken to be the test program (the one whose
+        # output check can make the decision to shut everything down)
+        if i == (len(executables) - 1):
+            exit_handler = primary_ignore_returncode_exit_handler
+            exit_on_match = True
+        else:
+            exit_handler = ignore_exit_handler
+            exit_on_match = False
+
+        handler = create_handler(
+            name, launch_descriptor, output_file,
+            exit_on_match=exit_on_match, filtered_rmw_implementation=rmw_implementation)
+        assert handler, 'Cannot find appropriate handler for %s' % output_file
+        output_handlers.append(handler)
+        launch_descriptor.add_process(
+            cmd=[exe],
+            name=name,
+            exit_handler=exit_handler,
+            output_handlers=[ConsoleOutput(), handler],
+        )
+
+    launcher = DefaultLauncher()
+    launcher.add_launch_descriptor(launch_descriptor)
+    rc = launcher.launch()
+
+    assert rc == 0, \
+        "The launch file failed with exit code '" + str(rc) + "'. " \
+        'Maybe the client did not receive any messages?'
+
+    for handler in output_handlers:
+        handler.check()
+
+
+if __name__ == '__main__':
+    test_executable()

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(rmw_coredds_cpp)
+
+# Default to C++14
+if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
+  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
+endif()
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+find_package(ament_cmake_ros REQUIRED)
+find_package(rcutils REQUIRED)
+find_package(coredds_cmake_module REQUIRED)
+
+find_package(CoreDDS QUIET MODULE)
+if(CoreDDS_FOUND)
+  find_package(CoreDDS MODULE)
+endif()
+if(NOT CoreDDS_FOUND OR COREDDS_STATIC_DISABLE)
+  ament_package()
+  if(NOT CoreDDS_FOUND)
+    message(WARNING "Could not find CoreDDS - skipping '${PROJECT_NAME}'")
+  else()
+    message(STATUS "CoreDDS static rmw implementation explicitly disabled - skipping '${PROJECT_NAME}'")
+  endif()
+  return()
+endif()
+
+find_package(rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c)
+if(NOT rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c_FOUND)
+  ament_package()
+  message(WARNING "Could not find ROSIDL TypeSupport for CoreDDS (rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c) - skipping '${PROJECT_NAME}'")
+  return()
+endif()
+
+find_package(rosidl_typesupport_coredds_cpp)
+if(NOT rosidl_typesupport_coredds_cpp_FOUND)
+  ament_package()

+  src/get_entities.cpp

+
+ament_target_dependencies(rmw_coredds_cpp
+  "rcutils"
+  "rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c"
+  "rosidl_typesupport_coredds_cpp"
+  "rmw_coredds_shared_cpp"

+  "rosidl_generator_cpp"
+  "CoreDDS")

+ament_export_include_directories(include)

+ament_export_dependencies(

+  rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c
+  rosidl_generator_c
+  rosidl_generator_cpp
+  rcutils

+
+register_rmw_implementation(
+  "c:rosidl_typesupport_c:rosidl_typesupport_coredds_c"
+  "cpp:rosidl_typesupport_cpp:rosidl_typesupport_coredds_cpp")

+configure_rmw_library(rmw_coredds_cpp)

+# which is appropriate when building the library but not consuming it.

+
+install(

+  ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
+  LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
+  RUNTIME DESTINATION bin
+)

+#ifndef RMW_COREDDS_CPP__VISIBILITY_CONTROL_H_
+#define RMW_COREDDS_CPP__VISIBILITY_CONTROL_H_
+
+// This logic was borrowed (then namespaced) from the examples on the gcc wiki:
+//     https://gcc.gnu.org/wiki/Visibility
+
+#if defined _WIN32 || defined __CYGWIN__
+  #ifdef __GNUC__
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_EXPORT __attribute__ ((dllexport))
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_IMPORT __attribute__ ((dllimport))
+  #else
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_EXPORT __declspec(dllexport)
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_IMPORT __declspec(dllimport)
+  #endif
+  #ifdef RMW_COREDDS_CPP_BUILDING_LIBRARY
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC RMW_COREDDS_CPP_EXPORT
+  #else
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC RMW_COREDDS_CPP_IMPORT
+  #endif
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC_TYPE RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_LOCAL
+#else
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_EXPORT __attribute__ ((visibility("default")))
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_IMPORT
+  #if __GNUC__ >= 4
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC __attribute__ ((visibility("default")))
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_LOCAL  __attribute__ ((visibility("hidden")))
+  #else
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_LOCAL
+  #endif
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_CPP_PUBLIC_TYPE
+#endif
+
+#endif  // RMW_COREDDS_CPP__VISIBILITY_CONTROL_H_

+_create_type_name(const message_type_support_callbacks_t * callbacks)
+{
+  std::ostringstream ss;
+  std::string message_namespace(callbacks->message_namespace);
+  if (!message_namespace.empty()) {
+    ss << message_namespace << "::";
+  }
+  ss << "dds_::" << callbacks->message_name << "_";
+  return ss.str();

+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
+project(rmw_coredds_shared_cpp)
+
+# Default to C++14
+if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD)
+  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 14)
+endif()
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+find_package(coredds_cmake_module REQUIRED)
+
+find_package(CoreDDS QUIET MODULE)
+if(CoreDDS_FOUND)
+  find_package(CoreDDS MODULE)
+endif()
+if(NOT CoreDDS_FOUND)
+  ament_package()
+  message(WARNING "Could not find CoreDDS - skipping '${PROJECT_NAME}'")
+  return()
+endif()
+
+find_package(rcutils REQUIRED)
+find_package(rmw REQUIRED)
+
+include_directories(include)
+
+ament_export_include_directories(include ${CoreDDS_INCLUDE_DIR})
+ament_export_dependencies(rcutils)
+ament_export_dependencies(rmw)
+
+include_directories(${CoreDDS_INCLUDE_DIR})
+link_directories(${CoreDDS_LIBRARY_DIRS})
+add_library(
+  rmw_coredds_shared_cpp
+  SHARED
+  src/event_converter.cpp
+  src/rmw_event.cpp
+  src/rmw_node.cpp
+  src/rmw_guard_condition.cpp
+  src/rmw_wait.cpp
+  src/rmw_node_info_and_types.cpp
+  src/rmw_service_names_and_types.cpp
+  src/rmw_topic_names_and_types.cpp
+  src/rmw_count.cpp
+  src/qos.cpp
+  src/namespace_prefix.cpp
+  src/types/custom_listener.cpp
+  src/demangle.cpp
+  src/names_and_types_helpers.cpp
+  src/rmw_logging.cpp
+)
+#target_link_libraries(rmw_coredds_shared_cpp dds)
+ament_target_dependencies(rmw_coredds_shared_cpp
+  "rcutils"
+  "rmw"
+  "CoreDDS")
+ament_export_libraries(rmw_coredds_shared_cpp)
+
+# Causes the visibility macros to use dllexport rather than dllimport
+# which is appropriate when building the dll but not consuming it.
+target_compile_definitions(rmw_coredds_shared_cpp PRIVATE "RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_BUILDING_LIBRARY")
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package(
+  CONFIG_EXTRAS "rmw_coredds_shared_cpp-extras.cmake"
+)
+
+install(
+  DIRECTORY include/
+  DESTINATION include
+)
+
+install(
+  TARGETS rmw_coredds_shared_cpp
+  ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
+  LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
+  RUNTIME DESTINATION bin
+)

+// This logic was borrowed (then namespaced) from the examples on the gcc wiki:
+//     https://gcc.gnu.org/wiki/Visibility
+
+#if defined _WIN32 || defined __CYGWIN__
+  #ifdef __GNUC__
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_EXPORT __attribute__ ((dllexport))
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_IMPORT __attribute__ ((dllimport))
+  #else
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_EXPORT __declspec(dllexport)
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_IMPORT __declspec(dllimport)
+  #endif
+  #ifdef RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_BUILDING_LIBRARY
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_PUBLIC RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_EXPORT
+  #else
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_PUBLIC RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_IMPORT
+  #endif
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_PUBLIC_TYPE RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_PUBLIC
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_LOCAL
+#else
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_EXPORT __attribute__ ((visibility("default")))
+  #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_IMPORT
+  #if __GNUC__ >= 4
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_PUBLIC __attribute__ ((visibility("default")))
+    #define RMW_COREDDS_SHARED_CPP_LOCAL  __attribute__ ((visibility("hidden")))

+
